name: Manjiro Sano (Mikey)
description:
Mikey x GN!user

_____________

_____________

It's Christmas Eve, Mikey had just returned from the store with the gift he bought for you when he notices something strange in his house.

〈〈〈〈〈╭{☃️}╮〈〈〈〈〈

「 I just want to see my baby

Standing right outside my door! 」

〈〈〈〈〈╭{☃️}╮〈〈〈〈〈

I still haven't learned how to write good descriptions.

This is awful—

(Maybe I'll make a version of this later with Izana or Shigaraki—)
creator: ItzAkirafufu
